news.t: ETF leader board dominated by nimble funds

holdings.infoBox: URAA is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Uranium Industry Bull 2X ETF (URAA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund aims for 2x leveraged daily exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US-listed firms focused on uranium and nuclear energy. URAA was launched on Jun 26, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: Solactive United States Uranium and Nuclear Energy ETF Select Index

data.title: ETF leader board dominated by nimble funds
data.text: The top annual ETF performers share a common trait, the firm behind them and investors who are ready to trade no matter which direction the market goes.
